name: Dessert Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe K-K-Krispy Pizza Crust, see recipe
recipeInstructions:
Dessert Pizza is a versatile option that works well close to dinner, at parties, and for breakfast. It's an excellent way to encourage those who dislike fruit to enjoy it.
Begin with an unbaked K-K-Krispy Pizza Crust.
Preheat the oven to 500°F.
Choose your fat-free toppings first:
kiwis, bananas, mangoes, oranges, papayas, pears, pineapples, strawberries, cherries, plums, tangerines, nectarines, dates, figs, apricots, golden raisins, apple butter, or marshmallows.
For an apple, peach, cooked pumpkin, or cooked yam pizza, add 1 teaspoon cinnamon and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg to the sauce of choice.
Place the fruit on top of the crust, followed by your chosen sauce. Bake for 10 minutes. Serve hot.
